items.label: Mood Grid Reveal
items.meta: Moodboard plays fast in a grid of squares w/ thin white lines — any cell YOU occupy punches through to the footage. (your new idea, live)

items.label: Band Behind — Rainbow
items.meta: Thick 7-color Fadi band through your torso, behind you. Stripes march on beats.

items.label: Band Behind — Solid
items.meta: Same band, single Fadi color riding the global color cycle.

items.label: Vertical Beam
items.meta: Rainbow beam locked to your x-position, behind you.

items.label: Big Word Behind
items.meta: Giant 'all works out' behind your head, tracks your position.

items.label: Word Stack Wall
items.meta: 'works' stacked full-height in cycling rainbow behind you.

items.label: Negative Space Fill
items.meta: Detects which side you're on, floods the empty side with solid Fadi color.

items.label: Split Invert
items.meta: Frame splits at your centerline; the far side inverts.

items.label: Echo Row — Squares
items.meta: Time-delayed silhouettes of you marching outward in Fadi colors.

items.label: Echo Row — Graffiti
items.meta: Same trails on the graffiti wall footage.

items.label: Halo Rings
items.meta: Concentric Fadi rings emanate from your centroid.

items.label: Frame Inset PiP
items.meta: Stage dims, a zoomed crop of you PiPs into the negative space.

items.label: Cutout Shadow — Graffiti
items.meta: Bg goes black; you're cut out over time-delayed color shadow silhouettes.

items.label: Cutout Shadow — Squares
items.meta: Same on the tunnel (you're small — shadows get tiny; judging scale limits).

items.label: Mondrian Panels
items.meta: Fadi panels partitioned around your bbox, reshuffling every 2 beats.

items.label: Ground Reflection
items.meta: White line at your feet + Fadi mirror silhouette below.

items.label: Band Behind — Street
items.meta: The rainbow band on the night street footage.
